verses.text: “Note pen Topa na Pasian uh mite na hi uh hi. Misite hangin note ki-atkeh loin, na sam uh zong na mettol kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen Topa na Pasian uh tungah a siangtho mite na hi uh a, leitunga om mite khempeuh sung panin ama neih dingin Topa in note hong teel ahi hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Ganhing a Siang leh a Nin

verses.text: “A kihhuai na khat peuhpeuh na ne kei ding uh hi
Na nek theih ding uh ganhingte: Bawng, tuu, keel
sakhital, sanang, simsakhi, sathak, saza, zosakhi, leh gamtuu ahi hi
Ganhingte lak panin a khecin a ka, eknel a hai ganhing peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi
Ahi zongin eknel a hai a, a khecin a ka ahi zongin na nek theihloh dingte uh: Kalaoh, bilpi, leh sakikhte in eknel a hai hangin a khecin kalo ahih manin note-a' dingin a nin ahi hi
Vok pen a khecin a kat hangin eknel hailo ahih manin note-a' dingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate' sa neloin, a sisate zong na lawng kei ding uh hi
“Tui sunga om khempeuh lak panin phe leh lip a nei peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi
Phe leh lip a neilo peuhmah na ne kei ding uh a, tuate pen no-a' dingin a nin ahi hi
“Vasa a siang khempeuh na ne thei ding uh hi
Ahih hangin na nekloh dingte uh: Muvanlai, musane, luimu
mupi, mumeika, amau nam ciat
va-ak nam khempeuh
vasa-kalaoh, pengpelep, vatawt, musi nam khempeuh
keising leh simbu, gam vatawt
leh tui vatawt, samuat ne musane leh tuimu
gun vapi, gun vazonei nam khempeuh; huihtun leh bak ahi hi
“Kha a nei insek ganhing khempeuh no-a' dingin a nin ahi hi; tuate kinelo ding hi
A leng thei insek ganhing a siangte khempeuh na ne thei ding uh hi

“Ama thu-a a si tawm ganhing peuhmah na ne kei ding uh hi. A nek dingun na khuasung uha om khualmite tungah na pia thei ding uh a, tua ahih kei leh zong gamdang mite tungah na zuak thei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen Topa na Pasian uh tungah a siangtho mi na hi uh hi. “Keelno a pi' nawizu tawh na huan kei ding uh hi.
“A kum kumin na lo uhah a piang, na khaici panun a piang khempeuh sawmah khat na pia ding uh hi

Topa na Pasian uh na zahtak tawntungna ding uh na theihna dingun, ama min a ten'na dingin a teelna mun Topa note' Pasian' mai-ah na an uh, na leenggahzu uh, na sathau uh sawmah khat, leh na bawnghon uh leh na tuuhon tacilte uh na ne ding uh hi

Topa na Pasian un a min koihna dingin a teelna mun pen, Topa na Pasian un no thupha hong piak ciangin note kiang panin gamla lua a, no-a' dingin lam a sau luat manin sawmah khat na paipih zawh kei uh leh
tuate sum na suah ding uh a, a sumte tunin, Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah na pai ding uh a

na deih peuhpeuh uh bawng ahi a, tuu ahi a, leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheihzu ahi zongin, na duh peuhpeuh uh leina-in a sum na zang ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian uh mai tua lai munah na ne ding uh a, note leh na innkuanpihte uh na lungdam ding uh hi
“Note bangin amaute in tanh leh luah neilo ahih manin na khuasung uha om Levi mite na mangngilh kei ding uh hi
“Kum thum simin tua kuma note' anpiang sawmah khat khempeuh hong paikhiatpihin na khuasung uhah na khol ding uh hi

Topa na Pasian un na sepnate khempeuh uhah thupha hong piak theihna dingin, note tawh kibangin amaute in tanh ahi a, luah ahi zongin neilo uh ahih manin note' khua sunga om Levi mite, peemtate, pa neilote, leh meigong numeite hong pai-in tua ante ne-in a gilvah ding uh hi.
